content: Hey, I'm so excited for the weekend. I've been practicing my DJing skills and I'm thinking of performing at a local event in Pittsburgh.
That sounds like a blast! What kind of music do you like to DJ?
I'm really into electronic dance music. I've been listening to a lot of Calvin Harris and The Chainsmokers.
Great taste! Have you performed at any events before?
Yeah, I used to perform at a club in the Bay Area before I moved to Pittsburgh. It's been a bit of an adjustment, but I'm loving the city so far.
I can imagine. The Bay Area is so different from Pittsburgh. What do you like to do in your free time, aside from DJing?
I'm really into speedcubing and drone photography. I find it really relaxing to solve a Rubik's cube or capture some amazing aerial shots.
That's so cool! I've never met anyone who's into speedcubing before. How long have you been doing it?
I've been speedcubing for about 5 years now. I started when I was 31, and I've been hooked ever since. I even competed in a tournament last year and solved the cube in 12.5 seconds.
Wow, that's impressive! Do you have any upcoming events or tournaments that you're preparing for?
Actually, I'm thinking of competing in the Pittsburgh Speedcubing Championship next month on March 17th. Wish me luck!
Good luck, Morgan! I'm sure you'll do great. Keep practicing and you'll be a pro in no time.
